meaning: n.富有冒险性的事,危险重重
examples: As they do, the riskiness of the system steadily increases.
The proposals, issued last month, underscore a marked shift in the perceived riskiness of insurance firms.
In such a network a firm's troubles can have an exaggerated effect on the perceived riskiness of its trading partners.
So clearly, the capital requirements, the riskiness of the two different loans, are entirely different.
The ultimate goal is that banks' capital should reflect the riskiness of their loan portfolios.
